mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT trade_date FROM margin_macro WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND exchange = #{exchange} ORDER BY trade_date
SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM margin_macro WHERE exchange = #{exchange}

SELECT trade_date AS tradeDate, SUM(margin_balance) AS marginBalance, SUM(short_balance) AS shortBalance, SUM(margin_buy_amount) AS marginBuyAmount, SUM(short_sell_volume) AS shortSellVolume, SUM(total_balance) AS totalBalance FROM margin_macro WHERE 1=1 AND trade_date >= #{startDate} AND trade_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY trade_date ORDER BY trade_date
